description: False-colour satellite image depicting agricultural land, specifically vineyards, at Úbeda, Spain. The image, captured by the SPOT-5 satellite on 2011-08-12 with 2.5 m resolution (1/2/3 Band Combination), shows a mosaic of small, rectangular to irregularly shaped parcels. These parcels exhibit two dominant colour tones: dark red, typically indicating healthy, dense vegetation, and a lighter cyan/turquoise, likely representing bare soil or less vegetated areas characteristic of open soil between cultivated rows. A prominent, winding dark red feature, possibly a valley or watercourse with associated dense vegetation, traverses the image, separating the cultivated parcels. The image reflects the characteristic structure of vineyards with small parcel sizes and potentially terraced cultivation. Source: CNES 2011©, Distribution Airbus DS/Spot Image.
